programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Just Push Play
programme.desc: A singer and guitar player is brutally and mysteriously stabbed in a bar. As details emerge in the case, the squad soon realizes that the victim had something to hide. Meanwhile, Jane's dad returns with shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Food for Thought
programme.desc: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve Boston's most twisted cases.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Mayfield and Wadsin
programme.desc: A clean-freak mom swaps families with a mother who lives in an unkempt and unruly house.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Genghis Khan's Tomb
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.desc: Extreme Survival Instructor John is gassed by the guys at his dentist appointment, extracted to the Canyon lands of Utah and dropped into a 200 ft. crevasse. Forced to confront a devilish maze of claustrophobic dead end passages, can he make it out?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Death Row

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: No-Sleep Nightmare
programme.desc: In Norway, Tim suffers a dangerously long day.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Pain in the Neck

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Yucatan water caves become John's labyrinth of doom.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Island of Death
programme.desc: Jake gets his chance at redemption on Death Island.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: With the summer half done, the Kilchers go out fishing. Each couple show off their own time-proven technique for catching salmon, halibut and trout.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Delicacy
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane climb reefs to hunt for octopus. Jane must face her fear of heights or be trapped by the tide. Otto struggles to keep a newborn calf alive during the annual spring cattle drive. Eve gives Eivin news that will change the homestead forever.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Outhouses, Cow Bras and Bears, Oh My!
programme.desc: The Kilchers scramble to make the most of 22 hours of sunlight. Atz tracks down predators killing the herd. Otto gets creative to help a cow with an udder problem. Eivin builds an outhouse. Atz Lee and Jane are startled while fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin use a duck hunt for some last minute father-son time before Eivin becomes a dad himself. Atz and Atz Lee's father-son bonding time is less fun - they're repairing the new bridge. Jane has her own adventure: fishing and shooting halibut.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Moving Toward the Future
programme.desc: Atz Sr., Bonnie, Atz Lee and Shane struggle to move a two-ton bridge maintain crucial access to the head of the bay. Otto & Charlotte fight a serious threat to their cattle.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: The Kilchers race to finish a year's worth of work in just four months. To fill their freezer, Atz Lee and Jane chase the first salmon run of the season, while Otto and Eivin bolster the homestead's defenses to contain their unruly cattle herd.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This Is Unreal
programme.desc: After losing his mother, Milton's shopping became a compulsion that soon took over his life.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Terry and Bill seem to be the perfect couple, but their dark secret has put their relationship in jeopardy. The tragic murder of her daughter drove Nancy to hoarding. Now, if she can't clear her home, she may just lose her husband as well.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Like Mother, Like Daughter

programme.desc: Two families welcome a new child into their fold. Two defiant boyfriends return, while another slips away.

programme.desc: The limits of motherhood are tested when Nicole has a c-section and Mariah refuses to help because of AJ. Kim goes through a painful labour and delivery. Chaé learns that her baby may have a heart condition.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Where's the Flyin' Lion
programme.desc: Bill travels to Orlando to showcase his Pop-Up pee pad at a pet industry trade show.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: V.I.Pnina
programme.desc: Sometimes when Kleinfeld is closed the salon will specially open the doors for clients with unlimited budgets to have private appointments with their designers. Pnina Tornai meets individually with three budget-less brides for a record-breaking day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I'm a Firm Believer in Signs'
programme.desc: Bride Jenna is joined by her NFL player brother, Justin Pugh, who feels he's well-versed in fashion. Also, Talmesha wants a gown that will compliment a very special bouquet honoring her late father.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: This is Going to Be a Stressful Time
programme.desc: Despite their fears, Tori and Zach must face the reality that she may need a C-section. Jeremy and Audrey are nervous as they try to finalize the purchase of their dream home. Amy and Matt prepare to become grandparents in their own special ways.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: When it Rains it Pours
programme.desc: With less than two weeks to go before their baby is born, Zach and Tori have scheduled their C-section, but baby could come at any moment! Plus, Zach's recent health episodes place added concern on the soon to be parents.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Vasectomy Baby
programme.desc: After a negative pregnancy test, Monique is in shock when she delivers a baby in her bathroom. Afraid that there's no time to wait for an ambulance, she gets in her car and drives her newborn to the hospital herself.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Twin Baby Surprise
programme.desc: When Jasmine is taken to the hospital with abdominal cramps, she is stunned to learn she's in labour with a breech baby and shocked that there's a twin.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on a Bath Mat
programme.desc: After suffering a painful miscarriage five months earlier, Reesa collapsed and fell into a coma. At the hospital, doctors learn that she was carrying twins and only miscarried one fetus.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in Flight?
programme.desc: Thinking that her pain is from something she ate, Manon goes to the hospital where she's shocked to learn that she is in labour and the baby is crowning.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Love Hike

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bodyguard

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Loud Proud Gypsies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed Whackers
programme.desc: Officer Arsenault teams up with police to stake-out a marijuana grow in the middle of the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rabbit on the Run
programme.desc: On Mount Carter a rescue mission is deployed to save an injured hiker, and a man is spotted illegally hunting rabbit. A man fleas the scene after being stopped for speeding and an injured pigeon gets a second chance.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: The cuffs are off and the game is on. The Game Wardens of North Wood Law take to the treetops to rescue baby hawks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Occupational Hazards
programme.desc: Deep in the Maine woods, danger lurks behind every tree for the game wardens. Warden Herring comes across a sprawling illegal encampment on private property. Warden Stevens discovers three marijuana grows and must seize dozens of plants.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In a Hot Second
programme.desc: On land and water, it's the wardens' job to keep people safe. Warden McBrine coordinates a LifeFlight helicopter for the victim of a serious car crash. Warden Buuck spreads the word on boating safety.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: Evan Goes Wild: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: Evan heads to the Tahitian Island of Mo'orea to fulfill his lifelong dream of swimming with humpback whales. There, he also helps collect DNA samples from lemon sharks and rescues and cares for an abandoned litter of kittens.

programme.title: Evan Goes Wild: Baby Bearcat Rescue
programme.desc: Teeming with wildlife, the island of Palawan is one of Evan's favourite places to visit. On his journey through the last frontier in the Philippines, he rescues orphaned baby bearcats, encounters pythons and crocodiles, and wrestles a water monitor.

programme.title: Evan Goes Wild: Nepalese Elephant Adventure
programme.desc: Evan heads to Nepal to work with one of nature's most majestic creatures, the Asiatic elephant. There, he also helps a man who uses his motorcycle to rescue stray cows and learns how vultures dine out.

programme.title: Fish or Die: The Four Norsemen
programme.desc: The team follows a lead to an extremely remote river in Greenland, believed to hold massive Arctic char. With its barren tundra, towering fjords, and ice-carved valleys, they discover Greenland is wilderness at its most pure and most dangerous.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Lair of the River Wolf
programme.desc: The crew travels to Mongolia in search of taimen: the largest, most ferocious member of the salmon family. Reaching their target will involve a punishing combination of back-breaking mountain trails, treacherous rivers and uncooperative Mongolian horses.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Pirates of Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Off the extreme eastern tip of Papua New Guinea lies Milne Bay. It's rumored to be home to huge schools of one of the greatest sportfish ever, the giant trevally. Trying to hook and land a giant trevally on a fly rod will be the ultimate test.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Big Bad Bonefish
programme.desc: Lake Windsor on Inagua Island is home to a mystery. How did giant ocean-dwelling fish get into a lake with no natural inlet or outlet? The Fish or Die team journeys to the tropics to investigate the mystery and hopefully catch some world-class bonefish.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Down in Flames
programme.desc: Rising sea temperatures test the fleet. Toxic smoke engulfs the Saga. Sean struggles to save the family business on the Brenna A. Wild Bill fears he could lose Nick to a terminal illness.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crushing Blows
programme.desc: Wild Bill uncovers the truth about Nick McGlashan's terminal illness. A damaging mechanical issue threatens to crush Jake's future. Warming seas force Keith into the unknown.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Moon
programme.desc: Johnathan and Andy Hillstrand fish together for the last time. A fistfight tests Jake's resolve while heavy winds and a snapped anchor threaten to wreck his boat.

programme.desc: A Washington bridge that creates a vital link between the United States and Canada plummets into the river, dragging semis down with it; experts must uncover what caused the collapse before the same fate befalls bridges across the country.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl relies on Facebook to stay in contact and keep up with the latest gossip. After accepting a few friend requests from boys she doesn't know, Nichole agrees to meet one of them and discovers the truth behind their online friendship.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No Fear
programme.desc: A man with a large gun enters a bar late at night and orders everyone to get on the floor, but one patron refuses to comply. And then, a pair of brazen shoplifters lead police on a dangerous high speed chase.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Stranger Danger
programme.desc: A man steals a car with two young siblings inside, causing a panic. As they try to escape, the kidnapper grabs the girl's hoodie, but her brother bravely fights back. And then, a 12-year-old stands up to the woman trying to kidnap her baby brother.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Grieving father screams at son's murderer; Angry defendant flips a table; Woman convicted of murder says judge 'unfair.'; Famous magician forced to reveal secrets; Mother punches two men at custody hearing; Judge sentences troubled teen to art project.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No Fear
programme.desc: A man with a large gun enters a bar late at night and orders everyone to get on the floor, but one patron refuses to comply. And then, a pair of brazen shoplifters lead police on a dangerous high speed chase.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Stranger Danger
programme.desc: A man steals a car with two young siblings inside, causing a panic. As they try to escape, the kidnapper grabs the girl's hoodie, but her brother bravely fights back. And then, a 12-year-old stands up to the woman trying to kidnap her baby brother.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Grieving father screams at son's murderer; Angry defendant flips a table; Woman convicted of murder says judge 'unfair.'; Famous magician forced to reveal secrets; Mother punches two men at custody hearing; Judge sentences troubled teen to art project.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Rise, Fall and Rise of John McAfee
programme.desc: He's a giant of the computer industry, a maverick who says he amassed then lost a fortune, but what happened when John McAfee moved to Central America? Some claim he was behind a murder. Now he tells what he says happened in those mysterious years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl relies on Facebook to stay in contact and keep up with the latest gossip. After accepting a few friend requests from boys she doesn't know, Nichole agrees to meet one of them and discovers the truth behind their online friendship.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Every Step You Take
programme.desc: College dancer Jodi Sanderholm has spent weeks practicing her team's big performance. So when she vanishes hours before the event, it doesn't make sense - until a friend comes forward with strange details about the days leading up to Jodi's disappearance.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: When Joe Gere hears of a serial killer on the loose, he immediately packs up his family and moves. But even in their new home, Joe is vigilant, and teaches his kids to shoot and defend themselves. But it's not long before he gets the call he's dreaded.

programme.title: Suspicion: Cosy Cove Killings
programme.desc: In 2007 Monique Murdoch's lakeside idyll is shattered when an intruder steals her daughter's underwear. However this is just a start, young women go missing and fear stalks the Canadian countryside.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in Montana
programme.desc: The small farming community of Poplar Montana are stunned at the discovery of the bludgeoned body of 17 year old Kim Nees. But nothing will prepare them for the surprise confession that sends eternal shockwaves through the town.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Daughter Disappears
programme.desc: When 16 year old Skylar Neese vanishes overnight, her parents, Mary and Dave, are instantly sucked into a mysterious world of chaos, rumor and innuendo. But, only after a heart-rending 6 months, does the unimaginable and violent truth finally emerge.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Housebound Homicide
programme.desc: Police take 10 years to track down the killer of a disabled Denver woman and establish if she was killed for her money or if there was a more personal motive.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In 1988, a nine year-old girl goes missing in Great Falls, Montana. Years after the case goes cold, a chance bus stop encounter breathes new life into the investigation, leading detectives to the horrifying truth behind the girl's disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When the brutalized body of an eight year-old boy is found in the woods outside Gary, Indiana, investigators begin a decades-long search for a sadistic child-killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Curtain Call
programme.desc: Like in one of his old Hollywood westerns, a former actor is gunned down in Yuma, AZ and police chase leads across the Southwest until they finally get their man.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: There's No Place Like Hell
programme.desc: Two neighboring Omaha mothers turn from friends to foes in a vicious spat, which ends with both their homes burned to the ground. But could a woman really burn down a house with innocent children sleeping inside? A wiretap reveals the real arsonist.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Burn Neighbor, Burn
programme.desc: In peaceful Alden, New York, siblings who live in neighboring houses get into a conflict when their prodigal brother returns home. Soon, the family is at each other's throats until their war finally comes to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bang Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A couple who trades the city for the country soon find themselves in conflict with the gun shop owners across the street. Mutual video cameras record threats, fights and growing hostilities that finally lead to shots fired and blood spilled.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Secrets
programme.desc: From the Great Phenol Plot of WWI to the D-Day deception Operation Fortitude, and from the world's first large-scale cyberattack to the greatest counterfeiting scheme in history, learn about the greatest secrets of warfare of the last century.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Tanks
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest tanks in history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Tanks
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest tanks in history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Secrets
programme.desc: From the Great Phenol Plot of WWI to the D-Day deception Operation Fortitude, and from the world's first large-scale cyberattack to the greatest counterfeiting scheme in history, learn about the greatest secrets of warfare of the last century.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons
programme.desc: Former Navy SEAL Richard 'Mack' Machowicz goes in search of the latest, cleverest and most terrifying technology already reaching out to dominate the battlefields of the 21st century.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a New Log Home for the Boy Scouts
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders volunteer to help Boy Scout troop 248 build a new lodge out of their old lodge. The boys' determination gives the Barnwood Builders something in return; hope for the future.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Ohio Hay Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders save a huge hay barn in Pleasantville, Ohio, shipping it to Cave Spring, Georgia, where they rebuild it into a home.

programme.desc: Mark and the guys save a log cabin from an old Virginia tobacco farm and to turn it into a tasting room for a local distillery.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Catskills Cabin: The Whole Story

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving the Last Cabin in Roanoke to a Local Resort

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bowls and Rolls

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers brand new carnival eats in the orange groves of California at the Cloverdale Citrus Fair. The Bacon Churro Cheeseburger is a meaty mouthful sandwiched between two churros.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Outdoor Eats
programme.desc: Everything tastes better when it's eaten outside, and Food Paradise is here to fulfill your al fresco appetite. At Saltwater Cowboys in Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina, watch the shrimp boats come in while chowing down on BBQ pork trashcan nachos.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sandwich Obsession
programme.desc: Whether it's Southern barbecue on a bun, a Tex-Mex take on a banh mi or lasagna grilled cheese, any mixture of fillings between buttery buns makes for a dream come true. From savory to spicy to sweet, there are no limits to our sandwich obsession.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Orlando
programme.desc: Jordan Andino's in the Sunshine State to check out the late night food scene in Orlando. His first stop is downtown for some delicious Colombian cuisine at Super Rico Colombian Bistro. Then he's off to Dixie Dharma, which offers up Southern food.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Calgary
programme.desc: Jordan Andino heads to Calgary, Alberta which is a mecca for eats after dark. For happy hour in the trendy Mission District, there's nowhere better than Anejo Restaurant, where Jordan tries some of the most authentic tacos he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the most creative chefs in the U.S. to get their mouthwatering secrets for meaty celebrations that include whole hog barbecue, buffalo meatloaf and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Extreme
programme.desc: It's time to go big or go home with Roger Mooking as he explores the most extreme dishes. The featured chefs are creating the most jaw-dropping, spectacular dishes on the food scene.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Float Like a Butterfly, Sting Like a Flea
programme.desc: Herman accidentally draws the ire of a bully at school and prepares for the worst.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: End of the World (Wide Web)
programme.desc: The gang is forced to endure reality for the first time when the city's internet goes down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Welcome to Walk the Prank
programme.desc: Follow four kids' antics at school and at home, which provide a source of inspiration for their pranks.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Prank or Treat
programme.desc: The gang is in deep trouble after a prank they pull on Becky Snyder goes horribly wrong. Meanwhile, Dusty sends a target on a roller coaster ride while posing as a popular mascot for an Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: There's a New Kid in Town
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Crushed
programme.desc: Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Allowance Drama
programme.desc: Hilarity continues when Uncle Will and the kids bring a Loch Ness Pool Monster to life and stage a fake game show 'Date My Mom!' to prank a contestant with a series of gross and wild challenges.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Rise and Fall of Courtney Lynn
programme.desc: When Courtney Lynn farts in class, it disrupts the school's social structure and leads to Nice Nancy's rise in popularity.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: WWE Edition
programme.desc: WWE superstars join the cast of professional pranksters to pull off some of the most outrageous pranks yet including staging a fake infomercial fiasco, making an arm wrestling video game come to life, and turning a house upside down.

programme.desc: In the Underworld, Piper sees Leo's ghost and Phoebe unintentionally breaks Coop's heart. Meanwhile, the Charmed Ones and Billie and Christy realize that they must conjure The Hollow in order to defeat one another, leading to a devastating battle.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Undocumented

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Father's Day

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: No Man's Land

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Chances
programme.desc: After tracking stolen navy TNT to a cocaine warehouse, Special Agent Pride and the team uncover a domestic ring that is producing their own cocaine and is headed by Sonja's childhood friend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Radio Silence

programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Bloodshed in the Barn
programme.desc: Not long after taking a new job, beloved horse-trainer Fiona Southwell is found brutally murdered in a rural stable, and a small seaside town in Northern England must find the killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Body in he Bathtub
programme.desc: Fresno mattress factory manager James Blanco worked to provide the American Dream for his employees, but when he's gunned down in the shower investigators must find out if he was betrayed by a disgruntled worker.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Lies, Cameras and Lingerie
programme.desc: When the entrepreneurial spirit turns two best friends into mortal enemies, one woman goes on the run.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Overtime Overkill
programme.desc: Catherine Marlow's ambition to travel the world meant working the occasional weekend, but her dedication is her downfall when she's killed in the office on her day off.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Call of the Cattleman
programme.desc: The Kilchers, fellow homesteaders and cattlemen pay tribute to a fallen friend by driving over 100 cattle back home. Atz Lee winterizes the Hunters Cabin, preparing to move further off the homestead. Jane & Eve's halibut fishing trip ends with a bang.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Mobility, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As the Kilcher family braces for summer on the homestead, Atz Lee treks to forbidding Perl Island for an emergency crash course in wilderness survival. Jane fights with creatures from the deep for food, and Otto and Eivin attempt a homestead sauna build.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Stranded
programme.desc: Still reeling from the earthquake, the Kilchers rush to make headway on time sensitive projects. Otto, Charlotte, and Eivin travel to rescue a family relic. The first fishing trip of the year leaves Eve and Jane lost at sea.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Danger and Destruction
programme.desc: Otto scrambles after a chimney fire threatens his cabin. Later, Otto and August attempt to acquire a massive machine and Eivin takes Findlay on his first-ever coming-of-age hunt.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Hunting For Disaster
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin's hunt for Ptarmigan ends in disaster. Atz Sr renovates his floating homestead. Atz Lee and Jane help a fellow homesteader.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Gold, The Bad, and The Ugly
programme.desc: Shawn's rocky pay-streak takes him for a wild ride. Kris raids another claim but a rival dredge fights back. Vernon loses patience with his crew's performance. Ken tests a new operator to keep running around the clock.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Sherpa
programme.desc: See how the Sherpa community united to reclaim Mount Everest following the 2014 avalanche that killed 16 of their members. The Sherpas are forced to consider the future of Everest climbing and whether anything justifies the danger they face.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Heat is Off
programme.desc: As summer's end approaches, Shawn claws his way closer to the top of the gold count. Emily leaves her unpredictable father to tend on the Eroica. Kris works his new partnership in pursuit of a brighter future. Ken pushes the repaired Myrtle Irene.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Claim of Thrones
programme.desc: Kris mines an undersea trench, but a cave-in of rocks threatens his life, pinning him to the seafloor. Desperate to find a patch of career-saving gold, Shawn follows a hunch to deeper ground.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A regulator freeze-up cuts off Shawn's air supply just days into the winter mining season. Vernon returns to the ice aiming to buy Claim 16, while Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Cold Man and the Sea
programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD. Kris makes amends with his crew and Brad dives for the first time in five years, saving the day with a surprise. Back on Claim 14, Emily tries to break her ice season curse.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: The Enormous Nose Nodules
programme.desc: Roger's case of rhinophyma is so extreme that he has difficulty breathing. The small, evenly spaced bumps all over Natalie's body are interfering with her life. Virginia thinks the equally sized lumps on her arms make her look like a football player.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: That Toe Has to Go!
programme.desc: A woman who walks on a giant mass of skin creates a big problem for Dr. Schaeffer, and Dr. Vincent meets a teenager with a big personality and an even bigger foot problem. Jolynn uses a grinder on her foot, and Dr. Haller can't believe what is going on.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh that she has been hiding.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pops: Split Decisions
programme.desc: Shakisaha's earlobe split in half during a failed body modification attempt. After recovering from a flesh-eating disease, Kelly Ann developed a huge leg growth. Terrified of doctors, Dennis has gone 30 years without seeking treatment for his head bumps!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bloomin' Bunions
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent's patient has feet that are so crooked her toes don't touch the floor, and Dr. Schaeffer meets a woman with behemoth bunions. Rachel has a toe crawling up her foot, and Dr. Haller has to get it back in line.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck in a Toilet
programme.desc: A woman is stuck in a toilet bowl for over 18 hours, and the medical team can't free her. A man's leg is mangled by a stump grinder, but that's the least of his troubles.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Yellow Eggs!
programme.desc: Time is running out and the Kleins still haven't found a new place in Florida! As the move date approaches, they're begin to feel desperate. They need to relocate, to retrofit and sell their Texas home. To add the chaos, Jen's parents visit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a New Guy in Town
programme.desc: Randy discovers major changes at Kleinfeld, the biggest of which is that the bridal shop hired its first male consultant. Bride Tolu contends with her opinionated sister, and Amanda fears her gown won't be modest enough for her orthodox wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Want My Daughter to Look Like a Sexpot
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone shopping at Kleinfeld. Timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her very provocative mother. Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Four Generations of Roloffs

programme.title: Little People, Big World: A Balancing Act
programme.desc: Amy is determined to balance her family life with her personal life as she throws Audrey a baby shower and hosts a birthday party for Chris.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on the Move
programme.desc: As the nurses to try to move Amy into an exam room, she starts giving birth to a baby in her pants.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Hope and Prayer

programme.desc: Professional climber Greg Boswell is high up an ice-covered Canadian mountain in the middle of the night when he is charged by a grizzly bear. Also, in upstate New York, a retired nurse is attacked by a rabid coyote.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Unseen Assailant
programme.desc: Paul is leading a canoe safari near Victoria Falls when a hippo bursts to the surface and drags him into the water. In Texas, five-year-old Jade DeMoss is outside, looking for her mother, when an animal pounces on her and attacks.

programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs. And, during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face to face with a tiger shark.

programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip. Hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life. And, a couple celebrating their wedding anniversary are attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Dragged Below

programme.title: I Was Prey: Alone in the Wild
programme.desc: Twenty miles into a marathon in a remote part of New Mexico, Karen Williams finds herself caught between a bear and her cub. Steve Campbell is working on an oil pipeline in Alberta, Canada when a mountain lion attacks him.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Surviving for my Son
