programme.title: Black-ish: Their Eyes Were Watching Screens
programme.desc: When Diane stumbles onto some websites that give her more than she bargained for, Dre and Bow must take action. Concerned that the internet is corrupting their children, Dre and Bow decide to make their home an internet free-zone.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Movie: Wes Craven's New Nightmare
programme.desc: Actress Heather Langenkamp begins to receive harassing phone calls by someone pretending to be Freddy Krueger. The more she investigates, the more she learns that Freddy may be more than just a fictional character.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: An astronaut crash lands on Mars and is greeted by human-like Martians.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Execution
programme.desc: A man about to be hanged for murder finds himself in the future thanks to a time machine.

programme.title: Movie: Candyman
programme.desc: A graduate student studying urban legends comes face to face with a killer who was executed years ago. The Candyman's ghost is summoned by many, though she works to figure out why he is seeking revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Neverknock
programme.desc: A teenager and her friends unknowingly unleash a creature called 'Neverknock' who uses their deepest fears to kill them one by one.

programme.title: Movie: Exorcist: The Beginning
programme.desc: Father Lancaster Merrin gives up his faith following World War II. However he tries to find his faith again as he has his first battle with his evil nemesis, the demon Pazuzu.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A cure to make mutants normal is discovered using the DNA of a very powerful boy.

programme.title: Movie: It Follows
programme.desc: After a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, a young woman finds herself plagued by the sensation that someone or something is following her.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Baptism By Fire
programme.desc: Audrey and son Anthony are taking on their first flip together in Woodland Hills. When a devastating fire rips through the house halfway through the project, it threatens to burn up their potential profit as well.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Going Off the Market
programme.desc: Tarek and his fiancée, Heather Rae Young, team up to help a novice flipper take on a multi-million dollar project in Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. This one-hour special includes an in-depth look at Tarek's surprise proposal on California's Catalina Island.

programme.title: House Hunters: The Clock Is Ticking in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple is ready to find something long term after years of building and selling homes in Ohio. He wants to be in country and she is tired of renos and wants something move in ready.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Renting vs. Buying Battle in Paris
programme.desc: A newlywed couple is at odds over buying or renting their first home in Paris, France.

programme.title: House Hunters: Big Problems in Schenectady County
programme.desc: A couple that's ready to buy their first home in New York has a big problem fitting in places. He's 7 feet 2 inches tall and wants high ceilings but she's focused on a kitchen for herself, and they can't see eye to eye in more ways than one.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Self-made in Yeppoon
programme.desc: A young couple is at their wits end with work in Canada and decides to start fresh in Yeppoon, Australia. He likes simplicity and wants no more than a beach shack, but she's looking for a little luxury to make up for her long work hours.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Lessons in Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in an upscale neighbourhood in Laguna Beach. Even though the house is small, it has an ocean view, which means big money. However, having never flipped in the area, they aren't sure what to offer for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diving Into a Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and sacrificing square footage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hillside Horror
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property in the upscale neighborhood of Palos Verdes, California. The house may be small but because of the area, it could sell for over $1 million.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: False Start Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a home in El Monte, California, but they can't look at the inside before making an offer. After checking the exterior, they make an offer and get it for a good price, but think twice after they get inside the house.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Puppy Paradise
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray helps two homeowners whose secluded, lakefront home suffered a flood. With help from designer Debra Salmoni, Scott works to transform their rundown money pit into a pet-cation getaway for animal lovers and their furry family members.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Beer Garden
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray and Debra Salmoni brew up something big as they transform an inherited property into a perfect Alpine-inspired haven. New homeowners Bernd and Crystal need Scott's contracting expertise and Debra's creative design ideas.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Year-Round Playground
programme.desc: A family's neglected beachfront cabin needs serious repairs. With its proximity to the ski resorts, the year-round rental potential is immense, so contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni give the dilapidated cabin a four-season makeover.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Ski Cottage
programme.desc: After years of neglect, a mountaintop cabin is in desperate need of renovation. Contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni go all in, turning the rustic cottage into a stunning ski chalet ready to start generating vacation rental income.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Fisherman's Getaway
programme.desc: The owners of a lakefront cabin in the heart of fishing country are in over their heads with renovations. Contractor and fishing enthusiast Scott McGillivray, along with designer Debra Salmoni, dives in to create a luxury paradise perfect for any angler.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Equestrian Escape
programme.desc: A couple bought a historic fixer upper in a prime vacation area, but they need contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni's help. There's no time for horsing around while they turn this carriage house into a hip, horse-themed rental home.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm
programme.desc: Despite its odd layout and decrepit state, Mina and Karen are taking on an old house with a ton of historic charm in the Old Southside neighborhood. As framing starts, the crew uncovers a major structural problem that hits the budget hard.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Mom: Black Mold and An Old Hot Dog
programme.desc: Christy helps Jill adjust to being a new foster mother and Bonnie has trouble convincing tenants that she's a good building manager.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Nanny
programme.desc: Dre and Bow start to slip on the kids' activities and chores around the house, so Bow persuades Dre to hire a nanny. After several interviews that don't go well, they meet Vivian, who impresses them with her desire to take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Leftovers
programme.desc: When Dre and Bow realize they don't have a legal guardian for their kids, they make it their mission to find replacement parents should anything happen to them. Meanwhile, Zoey and Junior reveal the truth to Jack about their old dog's death.

programme.title: Black-ish: Johnson & Johnson
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is getting married to her girlfriend, Sharon, and the upcoming nuptials lead to a conversation on tradition. Dre finds out that Bow is against the patriarchal convention of taking the man's last name.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: Movie: The Visit
programme.desc: When a brother and sister go to spend a week at their grandparents' remote farmhouse, they're warned not to leave their rooms after 9:30. They soon begin to witness strange and disturbing behaviour from the elderly couple.

programme.title: Movie: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: History is altered and planet earth jeopardised when an alien kills a top-secret agent in 1969. The agent's partner must travel back in time and work with a younger version of the murdered agent to restore the timeline and save humankind.

programme.title: Movie: Spaceballs
programme.desc: A man and his sidekick rescue a spoiled princess from an intergalactic villain.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Faceless Ones: Part 2

programme.title: Movie: Spaceballs
programme.desc: A man and his sidekick rescue a spoiled princess from an intergalactic villain.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghosts of the Jungle
programme.desc: What appears to be a three foot tall humanoid is caught on tape in the Indonesian jungle, some speculate to be evidence of a human species that disappeared thousands of years ago.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Voodoo Zombies/ Life After Death
programme.desc: Voodoo Zombies explores claims of the existence of zombies in Haiti. In Life After Death patients experience strange effects after life saving transplant operations.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Living In Fear
programme.desc: With her big heart and generous spirit, Michelle Cable is the rock of her family; her kids Billy, Jessica, and Josh are the center of her world. But Michelle's soft spot for troubled men leaves her vulnerable to evil intentions and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Grudge
programme.desc: With her good looks and sunny demeanor, doctor's assistant and part-time model Christine Kent attracts her fair share of admirers. But after one encounter ignites jealousy and obsession, Christine is blind-sided by the devastating consequences.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Chi Town Gossip
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a local icon upends a tight-knit Chicago community. Neighbors whisper about the killer's identity and detectives must break down walls of silence to uncover the shocking plot to murder a mother and owner of a successful hair salon.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: In Scottsdale, Arizona, single mom Tammy Lovell pays the ultimate price after she forces her boyfriend to confess to police his role in an insurance fraud scheme. Little does she realize; this good deed will soon cause her family's destruction.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Danger Travels
programme.desc: A retail store employee's crush on manager Antoinette Venditti Bruce escalates into an obsession after he's fired for inappropriate behavior. When she is transferred out of state for work, the stalker tracks her down to carry out his twisted plans.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: Abducted by masked gunmen and buried alive in a truck trailer underground, 26 innocent school children spent 28 hours held hostage in the dark before they made a harrowing escape.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Ezra McCandless
programme.desc: A young woman claims she was attacked by an ex-boyfriend who carved the word boy into her arm. But the crime scene tells a different story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Kelsey Berreth
programme.desc: An inside look at the startling evidence that helped convict Colorado man Patrick Frazee for the murder of his fiancée.

programme.title: Susan Powell: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When Susan Powell vanishes without a trace, her husband claims to have no idea what happened. Many feel he may have had a hand in her disappearance. As her family searches for answers, the tale takes a tragic turn that no one sees coming.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a popular teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body is found. But what happened remains a mystery for years, until her mother intervenes and forces police to re-examine the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: American Monster: Right Before Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a good-looking, successful businessman meets an aspiring actress, she appears to be the perfect match. But the honeymoon doesn't last long. The relationship takes a turn...a deadly turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: When a local nice-guy vanishes under mysterious circumstances, homicide investigator Bill Clark leads the charge. Following the trail of clues, police delve deep into the disturbing world of online deception and internet homicide.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the word descends further in chaos...closer to the edge of WWIII.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Revolution
programme.desc: The bitter rivalry between capitalism and communism rages from Berlin to Havana, and all the way to outer space. Russia seals themselves behind an Iron Curtain. A move that spawns the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880s Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields versus the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A newborn is abducted from a New York hospital and eventually solves her own case and is reunited with her biological parents 23 years later.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: After coming out as gay, a young woman's parents send her to an abusive Mormon conversion camp.

programme.title: Movie: Escaping the NXIVM Cult: A Mother's Fight To Save Her Daughter: Special Edition
programme.desc: Examining the true story of a mother's fight to save her daughter from a powerful sex cult.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Lives of Cheerleaders
programme.desc: New to a different school, a young woman is forced to try out for the cheerleading team at her mother's request. After becoming friends with the head cheerleader, she soon discovers that being a cheerleader has a price.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: An entire family is brutally murdered in their home in California, with their eight-year-old son being the only survivor.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: No More Mr. Ice Guys
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Shawn pushes his equipment to the edge while Kris and the Kellys rise from the ashes after an engine shack fire. Later, Vernon pitches his operation to a big investor.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Winter Take All
programme.desc: As the miners rush to solid ground before the ice vanishes, Mr. Gold outlasts the fleet to secure TOMCOD. Kris assembles a makeshift operation. Emily rolls the dice on one last dive and Vernon hightails it to land on dangerous ice.

programme.title: Everest: The First Ascent
programme.desc: Eleven lives were lost after deadly weather conditions struck Mt. Everest in the spring of 2019. Now, the world's most experienced climbers reveal what it's like to survive those conditions and what it would take to prevent another similar tragedy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Footsteps of Legends
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel and his friends pay tribute to the legends before them and attempt the Klondike Trail of 1897. Not only is it 600 miles of mountains, lakes and rivers, but leaving dangerously late in the season means the winter may derail their plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Racing the Freeze
programme.desc: Parker and his crew are only 50 miles into the daunting 600 mile trek on the Klondike Trail. It's a race against time as the water is quickly freezing, but with food sources running low they are forced to pause and go hunting or face starvation.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Winter Take All

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army - James Smith
programme.desc: Hit by a grenade thrown by an adolescent terrorist, U.S. Army veteran James Smith recounts his time in the military.

programme.title: Captain Philips: Somali Pirates Inside Story
programme.desc: Told through eyewitness accounts, exclusive Navy footage and hijacked with extra facts, this is the story of Captain Phillips and crew aboard the Maersk Alabama and their dramatic rescue after being taken hostage by Somalian Pirates.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: 2020 World Championship: Shotgun Round Group A
programme.desc: Join 48 of the world's best professional anglers as they compete in fishing tournaments.

programme.title: The Lost Lincoln
programme.desc: For the first time, one of American history's greatest undiscovered artifacts is revealed: an 1865 image of Abraham Lincoln on his deathbed. Now, Professor Whitny Braun is on a mission to determine the authenticity of the photo.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Return of the Yeti
programme.desc: Beginning in Kathmandu, Josh Gates heads high into the Himalayas of Nepal to obtain scientific evidence of the legendary Yeti. This time his mission is personal, and it will take him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives: I'm Here to Inspire, Not Expire!

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Brides by the Numbers
programme.desc: After trying on more than 75 dresses, picky bride Monica has yet to find the one. Princess-obsessed Natalie surprises everyone at her dress fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: To Sleeve, or Not to Sleeve
programme.desc: Amanda wants a dress that shows off her tattoos, but her mom prefers she covers up her ink. Southern gal Lexie needs to find a dress that matches her fiancé's family heirloom veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Engaged partners Amy and Lex are very much in sync - but not with each other's wedding dress styles. Then, bride Tara is looking to stand out in a non-traditional, high-neck dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Playing Chicken
programme.desc: Jessica wants a dress to satisfy her conservative fiancé, but her family has other ideas. Savvy shopper Tracy is looking for a deal, but her opinionated friend is unimpressed with the sale rack.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bride Overboard
programme.desc: Bride Andi and her fiancé struggle to agree on the perfect gown for their destination, sailboat wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Pastor Princess
programme.desc: After two broken engagements, pastor bride Shaundalyn wants to look sexy on her big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mom's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Kimberly wants to impress her fiancé in a sexy dress but her traditional mom has other ideas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Time for Nostalgia
programme.desc: Bride Leah is looking for a modern bridal gown with pockets to wear on her wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Sabotage
programme.desc: Youth Minster Tameria wants to wear a simple dress on her big day, but her fashion-forward family has other ideas. Hailey puts aside her sexy dress vision to please her future mother-in-law. Traditional bride Katie considers an unexpected gown alteration.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Shiny, Happy, Bling!
programme.desc: After spending her youth in outfits covered in bling, Emily wants to wear a traditional gown on her big day. Fashionista Diana is looking for a strapless gown, but her mom has other ideas. At her fitting, Jackie is still looking for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Twelve's a Crowd
programme.desc: Donnetta brought twelve friends to help her find a dress that puts her in the spotlight. But her unruly group make it difficult for the bride's voice be heard.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Jenee has every detail set for her big day, except for the dress. Country girl Jessica has a specific vision in mind for her gown, but her sister-in-law's city taste could stand in the way. At her fitting, Leslie is still looking for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: By the Book
programme.desc: Romance novelist Valerie prefers to live through her storybook characters for gown inspiration. Bride Kristy dreams of walking down the aisle looking just like her favourite childhood doll. In for her fitting, Rachel second guesses her dress selection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Up the Aunt-ie

programme.title: Doctors Behind Bars

programme.title: Pregnant Behind Bars: Breaking the Cycle

programme.title: Sell This House!: Row Home Revamp
programme.desc: A home has been on the market for a whopping 200 days and due to the pandemic, the owners are not able to fly back from their new home to make the necessary revamps.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Deadly Driver or Tragic Accident?
programme.desc: A terrible car crash leaves a father dead and his son horribly injured. The driver of the other car is miraculously unharmed.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Attempted Murder or Protective Mother?
programme.desc: After years of caring for a sick child, a mother may be hiding a terrible secret. Accused of attempting to murder her son, she is now fighting for her freedom.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: One Punch Assault or Self-Defense?
programme.desc: A young man witnesses a brutal attack.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent: Cold Case Killer or Innocent Teenage Girl?
programme.desc: For 10 years, a murder has been unsolved. Now, police have a suspect. The catch is that the accused would have been 13-years-old at the time.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A murderer explodes in the courtroom; a defendant pulls out all the stops to convince the court he's insane; a teenage girl learns her fate during a controversial and historic trial.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant becomes a one-man army when he takes on a team of court officers; the brother of a murder victim tries to get revenge in court; a defendant takes aim at a judge with a most unusual potential weapon; and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: G.I. Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers share some (mis)information on aviation, and put-pocketing turns patriotic. A double punishment goes up in flames, and Joey Fatone recaps the season.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Michelle Buteau Headlines

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Growing Pains

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seriously Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is topping off some great dishes with all kinds of sauce. In Cincinnati, a cafe puts its own spin on barbecue chicken and vegan chilli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Baltimore, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy's hitting the pavement for a tasty tour of Baltimore. First, just off Dundalk Ave., a local legend cranks out all kinds of crab plates. Then, in the Hamilton neighbourhood, a farm-to-table spot cooks up bacon-wrapped meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef It Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's divin' into menus boasting the bomb beef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes cross-country in search of good cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food With Attitude
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a diner for a delicious meatloaf and a chilli parlour in Ohio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoked, Grilled And Fried
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill and into the fryer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip
programme.desc: Guy tries pork belly tacos and carne adovada in a high-energy marketplace.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes cross-country in search of good cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Flavors
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down great tastes from all over the world. He tastes foods ranging from Mexican to Greek.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Alright! It's Taco Night!

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fun Family Favorites
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up quick dishes the whole family will love. Jeff Mauro combines two family favourites in his pizza stuffed chicken. Then, Katie Lee's sesame cauliflower is a takeout fake out with no guilt.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha Goes Paintballing

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl Meets Grill
programme.desc: Molly Yeh fires up the outdoor grill to make her favorite tailgating recipes with a twist, starting with Spicy Cheddar Juicy Lucies with Homemade Chili Potato Chips and Sesame Avocado Salsa on the side.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 4 Super-Fast Suppers
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has the lowdown on super-fast suppers, including spicy chorizo burgers with shortcut taco tots, her favourite fried calamari flatbread and a stunning stir-fried quick veggie pad Thai.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner's All Done
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's driving to town, but dinner's all ready to go when she gets home! There's a great Shepherd's Pie made from a hearty Beef Stew with Beer and Paprika, covered in a thick layer of Horseradish Mashed Potatoes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Sweater Weather' Weeknight Warrior
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian shows how simple lamb can be for a weeknight meal with his harissa and fennel marinated lamb chops with tapenade.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Big Apple Down South
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's friend from New York City is visiting, so Kardea's whipping up a meal that combines Big Apple classics and the best of the South. Her menu includes seafood pizza with local shrimp, Charleston tea and Big Apple crumb cheesecake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Around the World

programme.desc: Guy honours America's men and women in uniform by inviting four military vets with a culinary second-calling to play his GGG games. They'll be joining forces with the Messlords, a group of DDD chefs who travel the world cooking for our troops.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals.

programme.title: River Monsters: Curse of the Congo Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo set to encounter the aquatic beast responsible for luring anglers to their untimely death. Later, he is determined to come face-to-face with the Nile perch, a fish that lurks in a place where myth and reality merge.

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Legend of the Freshwater Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to capture the legendary Lua-Lua, an Amazonian aquatic beast that claimed the lives of many men. Meanwhile, Water Mama, a flesh-eating killer, still lurks in freshwaters and Wade is desperate for an up-close encounter.

programme.title: River Monsters: Hidden Predator
programme.desc: The biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught in South Africa, in a river. Could this monstrous freshwater catch be a fluke, or are there more shark giants prowling this river. Jeremy Wade heads to South Africa to see if he can land a monster.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy hopes to reel in a rare river monster that's become legendary.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Therapy Cat Needs Therapy
programme.desc: Jackson has a tall order in Delaware helping a veteran with PTSD whose therapy cat, Salem, is stressing him out. The cat daddy deals with Bartholomew, a cat that's shredding the furniture and tearing up a marriage.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed Philly cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians. It proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Baby the Bully
programme.desc: Jackson meets bully cat, Baby, whose holding all the female cats hostage, causing them to hide in the bathroom. Jackson comes to the aid of an interior designer's couch destroying cats, one of which is shedding pounds on a hunger strike.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sister Smackdown
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her. The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Ferocious Foster
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat named Henry, who having been forced to live inside, has protested by soaking the place in pee. A desperate foster guardian resorts to Jackson as her only hope to save a cat from being euthanized.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Posey the Terror
programme.desc: Jackson faces the highest stakes of the series when he experiences the vicious claws of a troubled cat who's terrorizing a family about to bring home a newborn baby; Jackson meets an inspirational cat named Skinny; Jackson meets Cole and Marmalade.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Philly's Forgotten Cats
programme.desc: Jackson faces one of his greatest challenges, when an old friend enlists his help to put on a mass trapping event and recruit a new generation of volunteers in an effort to save community cats in Philadelphia.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Meow Mates
programme.desc: Jackson guides a defeated couple and their cat who has been locked away for over a year. He visits a "Cat-Bassador" who works with his guardian to help special needs cats find forever homes. And Jackson visits an incredible prison program.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cat Sh#t Crazy!
programme.desc: During the global pandemic, Jackson is determined more than ever to help cats in need. He virtually meets a couple's ferocious felines and witnesses a family's cat eager to escape. Then, he hears from a veterinarian who saved sixty disabled cats.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Into the Jungle
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team head to Mexico to help pets and their owners in desperate need. Dr. Jeff helps a teenage boy and his sister worried about their sick dog. And the team head to a remote Mayan village to treat dogs that have never seen a vet before.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Little Miracle
programme.desc: When a beloved black lab swallows toxic metal, Dr. Jeff races to save his life. A lost cat is found after a year and a half absence, but has a mysterious injury. And, a tiny dog has a big, life-threatening problem.

programme.title: Halloween's Most Extreme
programme.desc: As if Halloween weren't scary enough, we're celebrating the biggest, the boldest and the absolute best of what Halloween has to offer.

programme.title: America's Scariest Halloween Attractions
programme.desc: Thousands of horror attractions open and thousands line up and pay good money to experience crazy characters, cool special effects and sheer terror. For the second year in a row, this special explores the biggest and best attractions open for business.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Cryptic Messages
programme.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery, a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert, a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Spirits in the Air
programme.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house, a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio and a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Bad Omens
programme.desc: A man uncovers an unholy secret in Kansas, a factory worker confronts the witch he believes cursed him and a Philadelphia secretary is tormented by nightmares foretelling her death.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise

programme.desc: Rachel Anderson was a vivacious single mom whose world revolved around her children. When she failed to show up for work one day, her kids panicked. Might her disappearance have anything to do with those terrifying phone calls she'd been receiving?

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Bread & Breakfast & Body
programme.desc: Investigators believe a young woman went missing on her own accord, but her mother is convinced that someone close to her is hiding a big secret. A two-year search for the truth brings investigators to the backyard of a historic location.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murder House
programme.desc: While attempting to identify the remains of a victim found buried in the backyard of a plush California home, investigators uncover a mystery with an unsettling truth: another murder was committed at the exact same residence, thirty years earlier.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets of the Snake River
programme.desc: Rachel Anderson was a vivacious single mom whose world revolved around her children. When she failed to show up for work one day, her kids panicked. Might her disappearance have anything to do with those terrifying phone calls she'd been receiving?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust

programme.desc: After devout, LDS mother Lori Vallow encounters a doomsday author, she descends down a path of darkness into a dangerous cult. The result is a trail of broken lives and dead bodies... including two of Vallow's own children.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Wishing Well Hell
programme.desc: When the body of a beloved, elderly woman is found brutally murdered and stuffed inside a decorative wishing well in the backyard of her property, a dogged detective goes on a years-long hunt to catch her elusive killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale
programme.desc: When a private investigator disappears with tens of thousands of dollars, Florida detectives question whether she's alive and well. But when a buried body is uncovered, they chase a trail of secrets and lies to catch a killer just out of reach.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracy Lawson
programme.desc: After a deadly fight, a mother’s secrets are exposed but she has a few surprises for the jury.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Lunney
programme.desc: An elderly woman’s death leads to shocking revelations about her daughter’s double life.

programme.title: Snapped: Chyann Bratcher
programme.desc: A mysterious death leads one family into troubled waters as they search for justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Vonlee Nicole Titlow
programme.desc: After an alcoholic millionaire dies of seemingly natural causes, an unexpected betrayal reveals there may be more to the victim's death, and to his beautiful party-girl niece, than first meets the eye.

programme.title: Snapped: Rose Chase
programme.desc: A family's suspicion leads them to the grisly truth about a young father's disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: The Visit
programme.desc: When a brother and sister go to spend a week at their grandparents' remote farmhouse, they're warned not to leave their rooms after 9:30. They soon begin to witness strange and disturbing behaviour from the elderly couple.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Lisa's Opus
programme.desc: As future Lisa writes her college application essay for Harvard, she recalls past disappointing birthdays that helped shape her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Boy
programme.desc: When Bart goes missing, the town puts together a search party to find him. After most give up hope, Sideshow Bob manipulates Millhouse into revealing where Bart is hiding.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Haw-Haw Land
programme.desc: When the Simpsons go to a STEM conference, Lisa falls for a crooning jazz pianist named Brendan. Meanwhile, Bart discovers that he has an affinity for chemistry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frink Gets Testy
programme.desc: Fearing that the end of the world is near, Mr. Burns tasks Dr. Frink with testing all of Springfield to determine who is worth saving. The results shake the Simpson family to their core.

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Good Read Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the family together, Marge forces everyone to hand in their electronics and take a trip to a book store.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King Leer
programme.desc: Homer and Marge follow Moe after the bar closes early and discover him and his father fighting. The Simpsons, after finding out that Moe has been excommunicated from his family for years, attempt to bring them back together.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Gets the Blues
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' flight to Gainesville gets re-routed to New Orleans, Lisa is forced to face her failures, and regain her confidence as a jazz musician. Meanwhile, Bart is intrigued by the voodoo in Louisiana.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Forgive and Regret

programme.title: The Simpsons: Left Behind
programme.desc: Homer gets Flanders a job at the plant, and he soon learns that no good deed goes unpunished when Flanders starts to insist on carpools and demands more from Homer's work performance. Meanwhile, Marge feels as though their marriage has lost its spark.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Throw Grampa From the Dane

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Not Dead
programme.desc: Bart takes a dare, and ends up in the hospital. To cover for himself and Homer, he says he went to Heaven and met Jesus. Christian producers offer the Simpsons a movie deal, which Homer takes. But Bart can’t deal with the guilt and comes clean to Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Marge and Homer's marriage is tested when they travel to a tropical island to compete for a million dollars on Marge's favourite reality competition show.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer

programme.desc: Archer and the gang are hired by renowned director, Ellis Crane, to investigate suspicious activity on the set of his movie, 'Deadly Velvet.'
